biography.value: Waterlogged fur clings to a skeletal frame. Bioluminescent ichor seeps from wounds, leaving faint trails in darkness. Drowned Wolves are risen undead wolves, product of the Rot's spread through the Bone-Fields. They are relentless but not intelligent. They hunt by scent and sound, appearing in scattered groups of 1–4 within the Bone-Fields — remnants of larger packs whose organized kin have already moved southwest.
biography.director:
ABILITIES

  • Bite (Main, Melee, Agility): 6 damage. Target is Slowed until end of Drowned Wolf's next turn.
  • Lunge (Main, Melee, Agility): 4 damage. If target is at range ≤3, target is knocked Prone.

FEATURES

  • Blind Hunting: Does not use sight; immune to blindness. Fights by scent and sound. Cannot be surprised by noise-based distractions.

ENCOUNTER CONTEXT

Beat 21. Drowned Wolves appear as obstacles within the Hard Montage Test, not as a standalone combat encounter. Combat occurs only if the party chooses to fight (replacing one montage test) or on montage partial failure (1–2 follow to the Green Heart threshold). Terrain with water or soggy ground gives them +1 to Speed-based tests.

Wolves act with loose coordination, attempting to surround isolated targets. They are relentless but not intelligent — they do not retreat, negotiate, or respond to intimidation.
